details.description: Nighttime street scene in Paris showing the Arc de Triomphe de l’Étoile brightly illuminated against a dark sky. The large triumphal arch in pale stone dominates the frame, with rich friezes, coffering inside the archway, and two monumental sculptural reliefs on the front piers. Wet paving stones reflect the warm streetlights and blue emergency lights nearby. Pedestrians sit on benches and walk along a broad sidewalk, with classic Parisian candelabra lampposts and leafless plane trees. Surrounding traffic and Haussmann-style buildings are visible in the background at Place Charles de Gaulle where multiple avenues converge.

details.description: Nighttime street scene in Paris featuring the Arc de Triomphe illuminated against a dark sky. The monument, a large neoclassical triumphal arch, stands at the far end of a paved, wet square with geometric tile patterns. Sculptural reliefs are visible on the façade. In the foreground, pedestrians are gathered on benches and walking along the plaza, with warm streetlights and reflections on the wet pavement creating a moody urban ambiance. The composition suggests a viewing point near the Place Charles de Gaulle, looking toward the Arch across the pedestrian esplanade.

details.description: A night-time photograph capturing the Arc de Triomphe in Paris, illuminated by floodlights against a dark sky. The view is taken from the Avenue des Champs-Élysées, looking towards the monument's eastern façade. The wet, paved ground in the foreground reflects the warm yellow light of streetlamps and blue ambient lighting, indicating recent rain. Several pedestrians are visible, including a group sitting on a bench in the middle ground and a person in a dark puffer coat in the immediate foreground right. The monument's detailed high reliefs are clearly visible: 'The Triumph of 1810' on the left pillar and 'The Departure of the Volunteers of 1792' (La Marseillaise) on the right pillar. Bare trees line the left side of the avenue, and vehicle headlights can be seen in the distance.

details.description: A nighttime photograph of the Arc de Triomphe in Paris, France. The massive neoclassical monument is brightly illuminated against the dark night sky, showcasing its intricate relief sculptures and architectural details. The image is taken from a pedestrian area with wet, reflective paving stones. Several people are visible in the foreground, some walking and others sitting on a bench. Streetlights provide a warm yellow glow, and a small blue kiosk is situated near the base of the arch. The surrounding area shows signs of city life with distant traffic lights and building silhouettes.

details.description: Nighttime scene at Place Charles de Gaulle in Paris showing the illuminated Arc de Triomphe. The massive neoclassical triumphal arch with a single central vault and sculpted reliefs on its piers dominates the view. Wet paving reflects street and kiosk lights, while people sit on benches and walk around. Street lamps, passing traffic, and emergency-blue lights are visible near the base; bare trees frame part of the arch.

entities.name: Arc de Triomphe
entities.notes: Parisian triumphal arch commissioned by Napoleon in 1806, designed primarily by Jean Chalgrin; completed in 1836 under Louis-Philippe. Neoclassical style; approx. 50 m high and 45 m wide. Features major reliefs including François Rude’s ‘La Marseillaise’. Tomb of the Unknown Soldier (buried 1920) with an eternal flame lit since 1923 lies beneath the arch.

details.description: Nighttime street scene in Paris showing the Arc de Triomphe at the far end of a broad, wet plaza. The monument is illuminated, revealing its sculpted reliefs and arched openings. In the foreground, a polished stone-paved square with benches and pedestrians, lit by warm street lamps. A blue-lit vehicle sits near the base of the arch, while trees frame the left side and a dark sky looms above.

details.description: Nighttime street-level view of the Arc de Triomphe de l’Étoile in Paris. The massive neoclassical triumphal arch is brightly illuminated, showing its coffered central vault and the large sculptural reliefs on the piers. details.description: Night photo of the Arc de Triomphe (Arc de Triomphe de l'Étoile) in Paris. The neoclassical triumphal arch is illuminated, revealing detailed relief sculptures on the facade and a central arched passageway. The structure sits on a broad stone plinth with ornate decorative bands. The foreground shows a wet, reflective stone plaza with people seated on benches and walking around; a blue emergency light is visible in the background, suggesting activity or security presence. The overall scene is urban, with street lamps and a dark night sky framing the monumental monument at Place Charles de Gaulle, near the end of the Champs-Élysées.

details.description: A nighttime photograph of the Arc de Triomphe in Paris, France, viewed from the Avenue des Champs-Élysées. The image is rotated 90 degrees clockwise (the top of the monument is to the left). The scene captures the eastern façade of the monument, illuminated by floodlights against a dark night sky. The wet pavement in the foreground reflects the warm glow of streetlights and ambient city lights, suggesting recent rain. Pedestrians are visible walking along the wide sidewalk. Distinctive high-relief sculptures adorn the pillars of the arch: 'Le Départ de 1792' (La Marseillaise) is visible on the right pillar (bottom in this orientation) and 'Le Triomphe de 1810' on the left pillar (top in this orientation). Blue lights and temporary structures or kiosks are visible near the base of the arch.

details.description: A night-time photograph of the Arc de Triomphe in Paris, France, taken from the Avenue des Champs-Élysées. The massive stone triumphal arch is brightly illuminated, highlighting its intricate carvings and reliefs. On the right-hand pillar (from this perspective), the famous high-relief sculpture 'Le Départ de 1792' (also known as 'La Marseillaise') by François Rude is clearly visible. The foreground features a wet, paved pedestrian area with several people walking or sitting on benches. Streetlights and blue-tinted lights from a nearby kiosk or vehicle create reflections on the ground. The image is oriented vertically, showing the arch at a slight angle.
